_comment: 069: pre-registered F02 adoption + subgroup gate (fixed BEFORE OOS, III). recent-K/formula params also frozen here. top_noninferior/calibration are TOP-LEVEL to match 068 _build_gate's cfg.get() reads (analyze F1) — nesting them would be silently ignored.

subgroup_guard._comment: intersection-union: adopted requires ALL critical subgroups PASS (no multiple-comparison correction). Three-way per subgroup: PASS ci_upper<margin, FAIL ci_lower>margin, else NO_DECISION.
subgroup_guard._margin_note: Per-GRAIN margins: race-level winner-NLL diffs are ~5-10x larger in magnitude than horse-level per-horse logloss diffs, so a single margin would make the horse-grain (nk/2026_nk) guard too permissive (analyze A1). T001 confirms the diff scale at each grain before freeze; margins may only TIGHTEN pre-OOS.

eval_window._comment: Pre-registered OOS window (III): frozen BEFORE seeing results so a post-hoc window can't move the 2026-subgroup verdict (analyze C1).

f02_formula._count_n1_note: N=1 races yield q=1, s=0 (uninformative but valid). Counted in obs_count by default — this drives coverage-band subgroup assignment (cov_0/1_2/3plus) so it is frozen here pre-OOS (III, analyze U1).
f02_formula._odds_valid_range_note: 1.0 is a LEGIT 元返し heavy-favorite floor (JRA win odds >= 1.0) and is KEPT VALID — excluding it would void the whole race under complete-field (FR-006) and systematically shed the most informative strong-favorite races (analyze D1). Sentinels are data-error markers only: <=0, non-finite. 999.9 (netkeiba cap) is treated as invalid PENDING T001 source-conditional confirmation. Provisional: PRE-OOS T001/T020 may finalize the range in EITHER direction (e.g. re-include 999.9 if source-confirmed legit); only POST-OOS is frozen (never relax post-OOS), III.
